offbeat.title: West Ham sanction Summerville exit as €70m transfer hijack agreed
offbeat.summary: Standard Sport understands that Summerville will undergo a medical shortly ahead of signing a long-term contract with the Saudi Pro League side. The forward, who netted five Premier League goals last season, had attracted significant interest this summer, with Roma submitting multiple bids for the Netherlands international. Summerville joined the Hammers from Leeds United in 2024 for a fee in excess of £25m. Move agreed: Crysencio Summerville PA West Ham sources had maintained that they were determined to keep hold of their key players this summer, but when Al Hilal trumped Roma’s offer, they decided to sanction a move for Summerville.

offbeat.title: Auto e Moto d’Epoca 2026 expands endurance and motorcycle programme in Bologna
offbeat.summary: Auto e Moto d’Epoca 2026 will return to BolognaFiere from October 22-25 with a programme spanning historic cars, motorcycles, competition machinery, automobilia and the European collector-vehicle market. The event is planned to occupy more than 14 exhibition halls, with over 5000 vehicles displayed alongside international dealers, manufacturers, museums, clubs and other organisations. Visitors from around 40 countries are expected to attend. A new exhibition named Icons of Speed will examine the development of endurance racing across more than 50 years. It will cover events including the Le Mans 24 Hours, Nürburgring, Monza and Daytona, as well as the modern FIA World Endurance Championship.

offbeat.title: Motorradunfall bei Glonn: 31-jährige Frau schwer verletzt
offbeat.summary: A 31-year-old motorcyclist was seriously injured in a crash on State Road 2079 near Glonn on Monday at 4 p.m. when a 63-year-old driver turning into traffic failed to yield, causing a head-on collision. The woman was airlifted to a Munich hospital with severe injuries; the road was closed for about 90 minutes. Police continue to investigate the cause.

offbeat.title: Slot, Bosz of toch een grote verrassing? Hoe komt de KNVB tot een nieuwe bondscoach?
offbeat.summary: The KNVB has reached an agreement with Arne Slot to become the new Netherlands national team coach, ending the search for Ronald Koeman’s successor. The two-year deal, reported on July 21, 2026, aims to stabilize Oranje ahead of the 2028 European Championship. Slot, currently without a club, will take charge immediately as the Nations League looms in September. The KNVB emphasized careful selection after Koeman’s early World Cup exit in June.

offbeat.title: 48 und stolz drauf: Jan Hofers Frau setzt im Bikini ein Zeichen gegen Altersdiskriminierung
offbeat.summary: Phong Lan Hofer Mit Instagram-Challenge kämpft sie gegen Altersdiskriminierung Jan und Phong Lan Hofer © instagram.com/phonglanhofer 21.07.2026, 21:29 Uhr Den eigenen Körper jenseits der 40 zu verstecken? Kommt für Jan Hofers Frau Phong Lan nicht infrage. Sie nutzt lieber die viral gegangene "WTF"-Challenge, um eine klare Botschaft gegen Age-Shaming zu verbreiten. Die neusten Hashtag-Kampagnen, die in den sozialen Medien trenden, kennen keine Altersgrenze, das beweist Phong Lan Hofer, 48, die an der jüngsten "WTF"-Challenge (übersetzt "Was zur Hölle") teilnimmt.

offbeat.title: Kiko Rivera cancela su gira por un "grave problema de salud": "En este momento necesito centrar toda mi energía en mi recuperación"
offbeat.summary: Kiko Rivera, hijo de Isabel Pantoja, cancela su gira de verano por un grave problema de salud. El DJ de 42 años anunció la suspensión en redes sociales, sin detallar su condición. Rivera, que lanzó seis temas en 2026, admitió que la decisión es difícil y que necesita enfocarse en su recuperación. Los conciertos quedarán pospuestos hasta nuevo aviso.

offbeat.title: McInnes banned for 'disgusting' Celtic penalty remark
offbeat.summary: Rangers manager Derek McInnes has been handed a four-match touchline ban, with one suspended, for calling a late penalty awarded to Celtic in May "disgusting." The decision relates to Celtic's 3-2 win at Motherwell on 13 May, a match Hearts were contesting in a tight title race. McInnes will miss his first three domestic games, starting with Rangers' opening Premiership fixture at Dundee United on 31 July. The ban does not cover European competition.

offbeat.title: Gearóid Hegarty enjoying special days alongside his best friends
offbeat.summary: Limerick’s Gearóid Hegarty and his All-Ireland SHC-winning teammates marked their historic victory with a homecoming parade in Pery Square on 22 July 2026. Hegarty, who set up a crucial point for teammate David Reidy in the final, reflected on the emotional end to the campaign as the group prepares to disband. Most players will not reunite until mid-winter, with Hegarty set to celebrate his wedding soon alongside several teammates. The bond within the squad was highlighted as a key factor in their success.

offbeat.title: Slievenamon wildfire spreads to adjacent Coillte forest
offbeat.summary: A wildfire on Slievenamon in Co Tipperary spread to an adjacent Coillte forest on Wednesday, 22 July 2026. Fire and rescue services are focusing on containing the blaze, with no immediate risk to life or property reported. Helicopters conducted water drops overnight as crews assessed damage and monitored conditions. Firefighters hope to deploy more crews once safety assessments allow.

offbeat.title: Prince George enjoys coastal fun in new video as he becomes a teenager
offbeat.summary: Prince George marked his 13th birthday with a beachside video from Cornwall and a formal portrait released by Kensington Palace. The playful clip shows him climbing rocks, playing cricket, and waving in sunglasses, while the photo depicts him in a dark suit. As second in line to the throne, he follows royal tradition with public birthday tributes. Next, the prince resumes his summer schedule ahead of the next academic term.

offbeat.title: „Der Berg kam herunter“: Horror-Moment an Berghütte in den italienischen Alpen
offbeat.summary: A massive mudslide struck the Innerfeldtal near the Dreischusterhütte in the Sextner Dolomiten on July 14, 2026, after heavy thunderstorms. Two mudslides carried 40,000 to 50,000 cubic meters of debris, piling up a 15-meter-high mound. No serious injuries or missing persons were reported, though one person was lightly injured and taken to hospital. Rescue teams secured the area and evacuated hikers as a precaution.

offbeat.title: En Corée du Sud, le propriétaire d'un restaurant aux deux étoiles Michelin encourt la prison pour avoir servi des fourmis
offbeat.summary: Un restaurateur sud-coréen, propriétaire d’un établissement doublement étoilé Michelin à Séoul, risque jusqu’à un an de prison et une amende de 20 millions de wons (11 800 euros) pour avoir servi des fourmis dans ses desserts. Les autorités sanitaires ont découvert l’infraction après des signalements clients en ligne, révélant des photos de sorbets garnis d’insectes interdits. La loi sud-coréenne autorise dix espèces d’insectes comestibles, mais exclut les fourmis. L’affaire sera jugée prochainement.

offbeat.title: Incendie au centre de stockage de Sainte-Rose : le maire s'interroge sur le fonctionnement du site
offbeat.summary: A violent fire at the Sainte-Rose waste storage center in Guadeloupe has burned nearly 5,000 square meters of waste since July 20, 2026. The blaze, suspected to have started from fireworks, remains partially active despite efforts to contain it. No injuries were reported, but waste collection across Guadeloupe has been suspended indefinitely. Authorities are investigating the cause while exploring temporary alternatives for waste disposal.

offbeat.title: Bisfenolo A, dal 20 luglio scatta il divieto nelle lattine: conserve escluse fino al 2028
offbeat.summary: The European Union’s ban on bisphenol A (BPA) in single-use food containers takes full effect today, July 20, after an 18-month transition period. The restriction covers can linings and other food-contact materials, though pre-existing stock can still be sold temporarily. A longer phase-out until 2028 applies to canned goods and certain hard-to-replace packaging. The move follows a 2023 EFSA assessment that sharply lowered the safe daily intake of BPA.

offbeat.title: France Target Openda, But Spalletti Blocks Move for a Week Due to Striker Shortage
offbeat.summary: Loïs Openda’s move from Juventus is delayed as the club struggles to offload the striker amid a striker shortage. Lyon and Lens lead the race for the Belgian, who scored prolifically in Ligue 1 with Lens but managed just two goals in 34 Serie A games last season. Juventus, seeking a costly loan with an option to buy, face a €43.9 million loss if sold permanently. The club’s options at center-forward are now limited to Jonathan David, Arkadiusz Milik and new signing Jeff Ekhator.

offbeat.title: Napoli, la prima formazione di Allegri per l'amichevole contro l'Arezzo
offbeat.summary: Napoli’s first lineup under Massimiliano Allegri for today’s friendly against Arezzo was revealed, with Meret in goal and a 4-3-3 formation. The match, played in Dimaro on July 22, 2026, ended 1-0 for Arezzo after Cerri scored in the 11th minute. Allegri made early substitutions, including replacing Meret at halftime, as Napoli pushed for an equalizer in the first half.

offbeat.title: "Je suis en totale admiration devant ces gars-là" : Tomer Sisley est le héros de "GIGN", la nouvelle série originale Netflix
offbeat.summary: Netflix releases the new series GIGN on July 22, starring Tomer Sisley as David, a Gendarmerie officer forced to lead his elite unit after a terror attack. The plot follows David as he hunts a bomber while protecting his 25-year-old godson Max, a newly certified operative. Created by Julien Leclercq, the six-episode series blends action with personal drama. Critics call it a gripping dive into France’s elite counterterrorism force.

offbeat.title: Cientos de personalidades culturales de todo el mundo exigen a Almeida que no desaloje la Casa Árabe de Madrid
offbeat.summary: More than 300 cultural figures from 40 countries have signed a petition urging Madrid's Mayor José Luis Martínez-Almeida to reverse the decision to evict Casa Árabe from its location at Escuelas Aguirre. The petition, led by Bahira Abdulatif, president of the World Forum of the Arabic Language, highlights concerns over potential damage to cultural and diplomatic relations with Arab nations. Almeida has defended the eviction as a necessary measure for preserving municipal property, asserting it is not politically motivated. The situation has sparked significant political backlash, with local opposition parties demanding a reconsideration of the decision.

offbeat.title: Kylian Mbappé is the EA Sports FC 27 Ultimate Edition cover athlete, marking his return to the cover after four years
offbeat.summary: Kylian Mbappé has been announced as the cover athlete for the Ultimate Edition of EA Sports FC 27, marking his return to the franchise after four years. The game, set for release in mid-September 2026, will be the fourth time Mbappé has graced the cover, joining Lionel Messi in that distinction. This announcement follows recent changes in game ratings, with EA FC 27 expected to adopt a PEGI 16 rating due to new regulations on loot box mechanics.

offbeat.title: Local businesses urged to prepare for thousands of visitors for Ironman race in August
offbeat.summary: Redding is gearing up to host the Ironman 70.3 Northern California on August 16, expecting over 1,600 athletes and more than 7,000 visitors, including friends and family. Local tourism officials anticipate the event will generate between $10 million and $12 million in visitor spending. Preparations have included significant upgrades to parks and trails to ensure safety and accessibility for participants. City leaders hope this high-profile event will showcase Redding and encourage future tourism.

offbeat.title: Favorieten etappe 18 Tour de France 2026 | Aanvallers zullen hopen dat Pogacar en UAE laatste kans gunnen
offbeat.summary: Wat een bizarre rit zagen we woensdag in de Tour de France . Tijd om rustig bij te komen is er niet, daar er donderdag wederom een mooie etappe op de rol staat. De goed klimmende aanvallers zullen daarin hopen op wat een laatste kans lijkt te zijn in deze Tour de France. In de Leiderstrui blikt vooruit! Parcours etappe 18 Tour de France 2026 Vanuit Voiron, wat ook de finishplaats van de zeventiende etappe is, zullen we starten aan een lange bergrit. 185 kilometer moet er worden afgelegd, en daarin zitten bijna 4000 hoogtemeters verstopt. Verstopt is het goede woord, want in eerste instantie lijkt het niet een zeer zware bergrit te worden. Maar schijn kan bedriegen.

offbeat.title: Fakir Case: Lawyer Slams Authorities for Blaming Moroccan Man’s Murder on His Character
offbeat.summary: Barbara Spinelli, a Bologna-based lawyer specializing in asylum law, has slammed right-wing politicians and those who seek to put the blame on Abderrahim Fakir, a Moroccan man Italian police killed in cold blood on Sunday on the outskirts of Bologna by Italian police. Spinelli wrote a Facebook post in which she announced that she was in charge of Fakir’s migration file. The co-president of the European Association of Lawyers for Democracy and Human Rights said she had represented Fakir last year in renewing his residence permit. “Stop putting Fakir on trial—stop asking who he was or what he did.

offbeat.title: Une nouvelle découverte dans l'Adour à Urt : la voiture et le corps de Joëlle Pouy, disparue en 2017
offbeat.summary: Joëlle Pouy's car and body were discovered in the Adour River at Urt on July 22, 2026, by the American dive team Adventures With Purpose. The 68-year-old, who went missing on November 15, 2017, after a medical appointment, was found inside her submerged vehicle, a Peugeot Partner. This discovery follows the recovery of another missing person's car, David Stevenin, just a day earlier. Authorities are now investigating the circumstances surrounding her death.

offbeat.title: Filip Bilbija: Derby County sign former Paderborn midfielder
offbeat.summary: Derby County have signed German attacking midfielder Filip Bilbija on a three-year free transfer. The 26-year-old arrives after scoring 17 goals last season to help Paderborn secure promotion to the Bundesliga. Bilbija, who has played in Germany’s top two tiers, joins Derby’s pre-season camp in Austria and could feature in Friday’s friendly against Freiburg.

offbeat.title: "Traiter les seniors comme des actifs" : les pistes proposées au gouvernement pour favoriser le maintien en em
offbeat.summary: A report released Wednesday, July 22, recommends France do more to keep workers employed longer before retirement. The high commission for strategy and planning found that while employment among 55-59 year-olds has caught up with Europe, the rate for 60-64 year-olds lags far behind. Nearly one in four 61-year-olds is neither working nor retired, and early exits are especially common among low-skilled workers. The findings call for earlier career support to smooth transitions and sustain employment quality.
sources: Haut-commissariat à la stratégie et au plan

offbeat.title: Le PSG creuse l’option Charles De Ketelaere
offbeat.summary: Paris Saint-Germain is accelerating transfer plans with the World Cup over, eyeing midfielder Charles De Ketelaere as a key target. The club aims to finalize deals before the August 12 Super Cup against Aston Villa and August 16 Trophée des Champions clash with Lens. PSG’s preseason resumes July 27, needing reinforcements to strengthen Luis Enrique’s squad. Monaco has rejected multiple offers for De Ketelaere, complicating negotiations.

offbeat.title: Corbo e Vicini trionfano al Tennis Club Monterosa
offbeat.summary: Mattia Corbo, 190 cm, ha vinto il torneo maschile di terza categoria al Tennis Club Monterosa di Cardano al Campo il 27 luglio, aggiudicandosi il Memorial Alberto Morosi dopo una finale combattuta. Lo studente universitario samaratese ha sconfitto Christian Agrati 6-4, 6-1, 10-4 in un match tie-break decisivo. La competizione, parte di un evento che ha richiamato numerosi appassionati, ha visto anche la vittoria femminile nella categoria 2.7. Il torneo si è svolto su campi in terra rossa.

offbeat.title: Wildberries, « l'Amazon russe », devient une cible pour l'Ukraine
offbeat.summary: Ukraine struck four Wildberries warehouses in Russia last week, including two near Moscow on Saturday that killed eight night-shift workers and destroyed facilities. A fresh attack Tuesday night in southern Russia killed one person and injured 15, with Krasnodar and Nevinnomyssk sites hit and fires reported. Wildberries CEO Tatyana Kim confirmed evacuations and injuries in a Telegram statement. The strikes highlight escalating drone campaigns targeting key Russian logistics hubs.

offbeat.title: Tottenham vs. MK Dons: how to watch preseason friendly
offbeat.summary: Tottenham Hotspur hosted MK Dons in a closed-door preseason friendly at Hotspur Way training center on July 15. The match was exclusively available via SpursPLAY, Tottenham’s official streaming service. Several players, including Pedro Porro and Djed Spence, remained unavailable due to post-World Cup recovery. The fixture served as a fitness and tactical run for Spurs’ squad.

offbeat.title: Avengers: Doomsday trailer reveals star-packed Marvel adventure
offbeat.summary: The first full trailer for Avengers: Doomsday has racked up 503 million views in 24 hours, making it Disney’s most-watched trailer ever. The film, opening December 18, unites stars like Robert Downey Jr., Chris Evans, and Chris Hemsworth in a Marvel mashup across three universes. A teaser hints at Doctor Doom’s arrival and an "unthinkable decision" threatening heroes. Tickets are now on sale for the December release.

offbeat.title: Rinnovo Ccnl comparto Sanità 2025-2027. Anticipare subito le risorse: siamo pronti
offbeat.summary: Il rinnovo del Contratto collettivo nazionale di lavoro del comparto Sanità 2025-2027 prevede aumenti tabellari mensili tra 106,70 e 181 euro, con incrementi aggiuntivi per indennità specifiche. Gli infermieri e le ostetriche riceveranno fino a 223,55 euro in più al mese, mentre altri professionisti fino a 200,10 euro. Le risorse includono anche il riconoscimento delle indennità durante le ferie e due giorni aggiuntivi di ferie. La trattativa prosegue per definire l’attuazione delle misure.

offbeat.title: French Jewish DJ Barbara Butch is defiant after concert disrupted by pro-Palestinian protesters
offbeat.summary: The popular French Jewish DJ Barbara Butch is striking a defiant tone after pro-Palestinian activists disrupted her concert in Grenoble, France, vowing not to be cowed from performing. Butch has also drawn support from Jewish activists who demonstrated outside the office of the far-left party whose top Grenoble official called for her performance to be canceled and has since doubled down, drawing support from anti-Zionist French Jews in the process. Butch, who came to prominence after appearing at the opening ceremony of the 2024 summer Olympics in Paris, had to be escorted off the stage at the Cabaret Frappé festival on Saturday, barely 20 minutes into her set.

offbeat.title: Remco Evenepoel enchaîne en remportant le chrono individuel de la 16e étape du Tour de France, Paul Seixas grignote pour le podium
offbeat.summary: Belgian Remco Evenepoel won his second straight Tour de France time trial Tuesday, finishing 26.1 km from Évian-les-Bains to Thonon-les-Bains in 32 minutes 19.33 seconds. Tadej Pogačar retained the yellow jersey despite finishing 28 seconds behind Evenepoel. Paul Seixas moved closer to the podium with his runner-up finish. The 16th stage sets up a decisive third week as the peloton heads toward the Alps.
offbeat.trend: classement général du tour de france aujourd'hui

offbeat.title: What has changed in The Hundred for 2026?
offbeat.summary: The Hundred’s 2026 season kicks off tomorrow with MI London facing Sunrisers Leeds at the Kia Oval. Four of the eight teams now have IPL-linked owners, including Chelsea’s Todd Boehly, who bought a 49% stake in Trent Rockets. Three teams have rebranded—Northern Superchargers to Sunrisers Leeds, Oval Invincibles to MI London, and Manchester Originals to Manchester Super Giants—while others updated kits or colors. Surrey will field 17 men’s and 14 women’s players, including MI London’s Sam Curran and Danni Wyatt-Hodge.

offbeat.title: SOKO Wismar am 22. Juli 2026 um 18:05 Uhr auf ZDF
offbeat.summary: A former East German cyclist, Jochen Wagner, was found dead near a charity vintage bike race in Wismar on July 22, 2026. Police investigating the incident suspect foul play after initially considering a fall. The event raised funds for children with cancer. The episode titled "Tour de Tod" airs on ZDF at 6:05 PM.

offbeat.title: Feijóo sitúa a Sánchez como "el señor X" de todos los casos del PSOE y promete "una limpieza a fondo" de las instituciones
offbeat.summary: Alberto Núñez Feijóo, líder del PP, prometió este miércoles una "limpieza a fondo" de las instituciones si gana las elecciones, acusando a Pedro Sánchez de ser el centro de múltiples casos de corrupción. Feijóo, en un acto en la sede nacional del PP, reiteró que su objetivo es la regeneración institucional y adelantó que se presentará a los comicios para "reconstruir la nación". El presidente de los populares evitó anunciar una moción de censura, pero insistió en que el adelanto electoral es la única "salida razonable y democrática". Las encuestas citadas por Feijóo sugieren un cambio de tendencia política.

offbeat.title: SSC Napoli e Radio Kiss Kiss: al via la partnership triennale
offbeat.summary: Accordo triennale tra una delle squadre più prestigiose e seguite del calcio italiano ed europeo e Radio Kiss, emittente nazionale tra le più seguite in Italia: una partnership che unisce due importanti brand nati a Napoli ma oggi protagonisti ben oltre i confini del territorio, con l’obiettivo di offrire ai tifosi contenuti esclusivi, nuove esperienze di intrattenimento e una comunicazione sempre più innovativa.

offbeat.title: Brasileirão, Sula and Conference play-offs on Wednesday, see what's on 📲
offbeat.summary: Brazil’s top-flight league, the Brasileirão, and South American play-offs kick off Wednesday with 11 matches across Serie A, B, and continental cups. Serie A’s marquee clash sees Palmeiras host Coritiba at 19:30 local time. Meanwhile, Spain stunned Argentina 1-0 in extra time to claim their second World Cup title on July 20, 2026. Chelsea is reportedly targeting former Real Madrid coach Xabi Alonso to take charge next season.

offbeat.title: We Zijn er Bijna!: dit is de exacte route die Marlijn en de kampeerders afleggen
offbeat.summary: Marlijn Weerdenburg takes over We Zijn er Bijna! for the 2026 season, leading a road trip through Croatia, Serbia, North Macedonia, and Greece. The new episodes air Tuesdays at 20:30 on NPO 1 starting July 28, 2026. Campsite stops and camper parking spots will be featured along the route. Viewers can track the journey via the broadcaster’s updated map.

offbeat.title: Rosalía Accidentally Mocked Argentina With a Repost After the World Cup Final but Has Since Issued a Public Apology
offbeat.summary: Credit: Instagram/ @rosalia.vt (screenshot) The 2026 World Cup final between Spain and Argentina produced one winner on the pitch and an avalanche of controversy off it, with social media filling up in the hours and days that followed with commentary that went well past fútbol and into territory that Argentine fans found considerably harder to brush off. Rosalía ended up at the center of one of the more unexpected controversies of the post-final period, offering a public apology to Argentine fans after a social media repost set off a reaction she clearly did not anticipate, and she did it while also having four scheduled concerts at the Movistar Arena in Buenos Aires coming up in August.

offbeat.title: Vijftien gewonden bij botsing trams op Erasmusbrug in Rotterdam, 'vreselijk ongeluk'
offbeat.summary: Op de Erasmusbrug in Rotterdam zijn twee trams met elkaar in botsing gekomen, waarbij een van de trams is ontspoord. Volgens de veiligheidsregio zijn er vijftien mensen gewond geraakt, van wie één zwaargewond. Vijf mensen zijn naar het ziekenhuis gebracht. De overige gewonden zijn ter plaatse behandeld door ambulancemedewerkers en konden daarna naar huis. De Rotterdamse burgemeester Carola Schouten bezocht de Erasmusbrug en spreekt van "een vreselijk ongeluk". "Het is een enorme klap geweest", aldus Schouten. "Er zijn gewonden gevallen.

offbeat.title: Delmastro: the Executive Committee has rejected the prosecutors’ request to obtain the chat records. The M5S occupies the government benches
offbeat.summary: The Committee on Authorisation to Proceed has rejected the request by prosecutors at the Rome Public Prosecutor’s Office to obtain the chat records between Andrea Delmastro and the restaurateur Mauro Caroccia , who is in custody on mafia charges. Meanwhile, MPs from the Five Star Movement occupied the government benches in the Senate in protest, holding up placards reading ‘release the chat logs’. The sitting was suspended. The occupation of the government benches lasted over half an hour. “Shame on you, shame on you,” shouted the Five Star Movement senators. The centre-right responded in unison: “Clowns, clowns”.

offbeat.title: Obituary for David J. Ascione
offbeat.summary: David J. Ascione ("D.J.") passed away on July 19, 2026, at the age of 62. Dave was a lifelong resident of Toms River, New Jersey. He grew up with his family and worked in the family's business, Ascione Florist and Greenhouse, located on Route 9 in the Pleasant Plains section of Toms River. He was also a proud past member of the Pleasant Plains Volunteer Fire Company.
offbeat.sourceName: Timothy E. Ryan Home For Funerals
sources: Timothy E. Ryan Home For Funerals

offbeat.title: Wreckage of Pan Am plane that shaped aviation safety found 74 years on
offbeat.summary: The wreckage of a Pan American Airways plane that crashed in 1952 has been found 74 years later, 2,000 feet below sea level off Puerto Rico. The Clipper Endeavor went down after multiple-engine failure, killing 52 of the 69 passengers and crew. The disaster led to mandatory airline safety briefings worldwide. The discovery was made using a sonar-equipped drone during an expedition led by the Air/Sea Heritage Foundation.

offbeat.title: Who is Mykhailo Drapatyi, Ukraine's new commander-in-chief?
offbeat.summary: Ukraine has a new commander-in-chief: Major General Mykhailo Drapatyi, 43, replacing Oleksandr Syrskyi. His appointment follows protests that initially backed ex-defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov but shifted to demand Syrskyi’s removal. Drapatyi, praised for his military experience and leadership, rose to prominence in 2014 during the battle for Mariupol against pro-Russian separatists. The change comes as Ukraine continues its defense against Russia’s invasion.

offbeat.title: Modelling scout linked to Epstein found dead in Paris
offbeat.summary: A modelling scout linked to Jeffrey Epstein was found dead in his Paris home on Monday. Daniel Siad, 69, was discovered in Colombes, and authorities opened an investigation into his death. Siad’s name appeared thousands of times in released Epstein files, and he faced multiple rape allegations in France, though he was never prosecuted. His lawyer maintained his innocence, while an Epstein victim claimed Siad introduced her to Epstein.

tech.title: Apple is reportedly testing a MacBook Neo with more RAM
tech.summary: Apple is testing a new MacBook Neo with upgraded specs, including an A19 Pro processor and 12GB of RAM, up from the current 8GB. The refreshed model may also introduce new colors and could discontinue the lowest-priced 256GB storage option. Component shortages and broader price hikes across Apple’s lineup suggest the updated Neo will cost more than its predecessor. Meanwhile, Apple is also reportedly preparing refreshed iMacs with OLED screens.

tech.title: Here’s what Samsung’s smart glasses actually look like
tech.summary: Samsung’s new smart glasses, developed with Google and eyewear brands Gentle Monster and Warby Parker, will launch this fall with a 9-hour battery life. Four designs were revealed—two boxy black frames and two rounded red-brown pairs—with more styles expected. Lightweight and compact, the glasses feature hidden speakers, a single button, and a power switch. Hands-on testing was not permitted during the first public look.

tech.title: How the Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 phones compare
tech.summary: Samsung’s Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 series launched July 2026, hitting shelves August 7. The Z Fold 8 starts at $1,899 with a 7.6-inch main screen and 5.5-inch cover display, while the Z Fold 8 Ultra tops $2,099 with a 200MP camera and 7.6-inch cover screen. Both models feature AI upgrades and design tweaks, but skip major changes from last year’s versions. Pre-orders begin next week ahead of the August release.

politics.title: Mahmood and Streeting accused of making ‘cheap jokes’ about prisoner early release scheme
politics.summary: Justice Secretary Alex Norris faced backlash after Labour ministers Wes Streeting and Shabana Mahmood joked about the government’s early prisoner release scheme. The comments, caught on camera, sparked criticism from crime victims who called the remarks insensitive. Both ministers apologized, acknowledging the seriousness of the issue. The government has not commented on the incident.

politics.title: South Carolina and Nevada Fight to Kick Off Democrats’ 2028 Presidential Calendar
politics.summary: The calendar order could be hugely important to the 2028 presidential primary race. Democratic insiders will try to sketch out a schedule this week, and rival states are sniping at one another.

politics.title: Rubio and Chinese Diplomat Make Plans for Trump and Xi’s Washington Summit
politics.summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio spent much of a meeting with China’s foreign minister discussing the summit, but did not bring up President Trump’s claims of election interference by China.

health.title: Target ultra-processed food to reduce obesity in Britain | Letter
health.summary: A parliamentary report urges Britain to focus on cutting ultra-processed foods to tackle obesity, identifying sugar and refined carbs as the main culprits. The health committee says obesity is driven by engineered food environments, not personal failure. Current policies wrongly treat fat, salt and sugar as equally harmful, pushing manufacturers to swap fat for sugar while claiming health benefits. Next, lawmakers may push stricter labeling and reformulation rules to hold industry accountable.

health.title: Fifth person dies in New York City amid legionnaires’ disease outbreak
health.summary: A fifth person has died in New York City amid a legionnaires’ disease outbreak on Manhattan’s Upper East Side. Health officials report 82 cases and five deaths, with eight still hospitalized. No new cases have been diagnosed in six days, and 34 cooling towers tested positive for legionella bacteria. The city continues testing remaining towers as officials monitor for further spread.

health.title: Government Overhauls Teen Pregnancy Program to Focus on Marriage and Starting Families
health.summary: The administration canceled federal grants to organizations across the country, accusing them of encouraging premarital sex. New criteria say programs should stress abstinence.

breaking.title: Two Russians handed down jail terms for terrorism and spying in Angola
breaking.summary: Two Russians were sentenced in Luanda for terrorism and spying: Igor Ratchin received 11 years and Lev Lakshtanov eight years. They were arrested in August over alleged efforts to incite protests, spread disinformation and interfere in Angola’s 2025 presidential election. Authorities linked them to Africa Politology, described as a Russian political network tied to the Wagner group. Both denied involvement and their lawyers sought extradition to Russia.

breaking.title: Mamdani walks back pledge to arrest Netanyahu citing lack of authority
breaking.summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has walked back his pledge to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, citing lack of legal authority. Mamdani now urges US officials to enforce the International Criminal Court’s arrest warrant, though the US is not an ICC member. Netanyahu’s visit to the US remains protected after President Trump stated he would not be arrested. Mamdani’s team reviewed legal options and confirmed no avenue exists under current law.

breaking.title: French police formally investigate woman over 2025 killing of Briton
breaking.summary: French police have formally charged a 70-year-old woman with the April 2025 stabbing death of British-South African mother Karen Carter, 65, in Trémolat, Dordogne. Prosecutors say the investigation, opened May 7, 2025, led to formal charges after initial custody and release. Carter, who managed holiday rentals, was found near her car with stab wounds. Authorities continue to probe the motive as the case moves forward.

crisis.title: Ex-Southern Water boss among four charged over alleged plan to manipulate water tests
crisis.summary: Four former Southern Water executives have been charged with conspiring to defraud regulators by manipulating water tests between 2012 and 2017. Matthew Wright, former CEO, along with Philip Barker, Clive Massey and Mark Gregory, faces allegations of removing wastewater to falsify results and avoid £45m in penalties. The charges follow a legal challenge by Wright, dismissed by judges last week. Southern Water says it has since overhauled practices and denies current wrongdoing.

crisis.title: Former Lloyd's of London boss's relationship breached rules, firm says
crisis.summary: Lloyd’s of London says former CEO John Neal breached compliance rules by failing to disclose his close relationship with corporate affairs director Rebekah Clement. The firm found their connection could create a perceived conflict of interest but found no evidence of a romantic relationship. Clement’s lawyer disputes the findings and says she is considering legal action. Neal stated all parties can now move on.

crisis.title: Trump Administration Plans to Stick With Tariffs, Trade Representative Says
crisis.summary: Jamieson Greer, the president’s top trade negotiator, told the Senate that the United States remained intent on tariffs as it prepared to replace duties the Supreme Court struck down.

entertainment.title: Kenneth Branagh to Star in Paramount+ Drama ‘Laird’ Set in Scottish Highlands
entertainment.summary: Paramount+ has greenlit the drama series Laird, with Kenneth Branagh starring in the lead role. Set in the Scottish Highlands, the epic family saga is created by Jez and John-Henry Butterworth, known for The Agency and Mobland. Production is set to begin in 2024. The series marks Branagh’s return to television after his acclaimed role in This Is Going to Hurt.

entertainment.title: Glen Powell, Richard Linklater Teaming Up for Lou Gehrig Biopic, Lorne Michaels Producing
entertainment.summary: Glen Powell and Richard Linklater are teaming up to star in and direct a new Lou Gehrig biopic for Universal Pictures. The film will mark their third collaboration after "Hit Man" and "Everybody Wants Some." Gehrig, a Hall of Fame baseball legend, holds the record for most consecutive games played at 2,130. Production is set to begin later this year.

entertainment.title: Victoria Monét Announces New Album ‘Frequency of Love,’ Releases New Single ‘Reach Out’
entertainment.summary: Victoria Monét will release her second album, Frequency of Love, on October 2 via Lovett Music/RCA Records. The R&B singer also debuted her new single Reach Out, produced by Kaytranada and D’Mile, with a video directed by Dave Meyers. The project marks her follow-up to her 2020 Grammy-winning album. Next, Monét is expected to tour in support of the album.

facts.title: Trump Administration to Announce Deal That Could Let Saudis Enrich Nuclear Fuel
facts.summary: The Trump administration will announce Wednesday a nuclear cooperation deal with Saudi Arabia allowing the kingdom to enrich its own fuel for reactors. U.S. officials say the agreement, to be signed in Washington, could generate billions for American nuclear firms like Westinghouse. Congress will receive details shortly after. The move faces bipartisan skepticism in Washington and opposition from Israel over proliferation risks.

facts.title: Susumu Tonegawa Dies at 86; Nobel Laureate Showed How Antibodies Fight Infection
facts.summary: The first Japanese scientist to win the Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine, he went on to discover how memories are stored, advancing understanding of how the brain works.

facts.title: He’s the Last Great Land Artist You’ve Never Heard Of
facts.summary: Charles Ross spent 50 years building “Star Axis,” a naked-eye observatory in New Mexico. Now his masterwork is ready. How to share it with a changed world?

sports.title: McInnes given four-match ban for 'disgusting' Celtic penalty remark
sports.summary: Rangers manager Derek McInnes has been handed a four-match touchline ban for calling Celtic’s late penalty against Motherwell "disgusting." The Scottish FA imposed the ban over comments made after Hearts’ title-winning season finale in May, where Celtic won 3-2. McInnes will miss three league games and one League Cup tie, starting with Rangers’ Premiership opener at Dundee United on July 31. The ban does not apply to Europa League qualifiers.

sports.title: Burkina Faso, Mali and Niger launch bid for 2032 Afcon
sports.summary: Burkina Faso, Mali and Niger jointly bid to host the 2032 Africa Cup of Nations. The three military-led nations submitted their proposal to the Confederation of African Football, which opened applications for 2028, 2032 and 2036 editions. The bid emphasizes regional integration and sustainable development. Despite ongoing jihadist violence and political shifts toward Russia, the countries aim to present a credible hosting plan. Caf will review bids before final decisions.
